ResearchProjectDef.label: universal workbench
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop a single industrial-grade workbench capable of handling most common manufacturing tasks from a single station. Operates at half the speed of dedicated benches. Does not support cooking, drug production, or advanced fabrication.

ResearchProjectDef.label: omniversal workbench
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop a pinnacle-tier fabrication platform capable of performing every known manufacturing process at full efficiency. Does not support cooking or drug production.
